narrative:
Washington Township has 2,957 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
